title: Snod
description: Small April Fools mod that makes everything start with SN
body:
This mod has been made as an April Fools joke where it makes every item and mob names start with the letters "SN"\
Some examples of this are:\
Dirt -> Snirt\
Apple -> Snapple\
Oak Planks -> Snoak Planks

Creeper -> Sneeper

Villager -> Snillager\
Ender Dragon -> Snender Dragon\
Chest -> Snest
